scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui build && next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3002
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui build && next build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui build && tsc --noEmit
